superhuman_api.google_id_help: Find in Superhuman DevTools → Application → Cookies → accounts.superhuman.com. Look for a cookie whose NAME is a long number.
superhuman_api.device_id_help: Find in Superhuman DevTools → Network → any API request → x-device-id header. Starts with 'native-'.
superhuman_api.team_shard_key_help: 4-char substring from the team_id, after 'team_' prefix. e.g. team_XXXxXxXxXxXxXxXxX → shard key is chars 9-12 of the team_id.
